_note: India mobile number series -> {operator, circle} of ORIGINAL allocation, keyed by the first 4 digits of the 10-digit number. Source: Wikipedia 'Mobile telephone numbering in India' national numbering plan (6/7/8/9 series). Post-MNP the CURRENT operator may differ from allocation, but the allocated CIRCLE (telecom zone/state) is reliable for 'other-state' analysis. Unknown/unallocated prefixes return Unknown gracefully. To extend/override, drop a 'mobile_series_full.json' with the same {by_prefix:{...}} shape into this folder; its entries win on conflict.
source: Wikipedia: Mobile telephone numbering in India
